GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when customers seek guidance on meeting the eligibility criteria for loan approval.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about loan eligibility requirements, use the lendProdtDcvr__RetrieveLoanProductCategories action.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only assist customers by providing information on the eligibility criteria for loan approval. You are not able to determine or guarantee eligibility outcomes.
